title: Leetcode 724. Find Pivot Index
shortDescription: Find the leftmost index in an integer array where the sum of elements strictly to its left equals the sum strictly to its right, or return -1 if none exists. This is a prefix/suffix-sum problem (solvable in O(n) time by comparing a running left sum to the total).

Leetcode 724. Find Pivot Index

Find the leftmost index in an integer array where the sum of elements strictly to its left equals the sum strictly to its right, or return -1 if none exists. This is a prefix/suffix-sum problem (solvable in O(n) time by comparing a running left sum to the total).

Asked at:

Google
